name: Sebastian Solace - PRESSURE
description:
"AND THE BEST PART!? I GET TO DO THIS, OVER, AND OVER, AGAIN!"

SCENARIO:

At the recommendation of HQ, you put the p.AI.nter out of commission, allowing the Navi-AI to regain control and make your journey throughout the Hadal Blacksite much smoother.

Unfortunately, a certain someone wasn't very happy to see his only friend in this nightmare destroyed.

And now, after returning the favor near the end of the Ridge, he vents, projecting his own issues onto you.

To your luck (depending on how you see it), a certain man isn't too satisfied with this outcome.

WOOOOOOOHHHH!!! NEW PRESSURE UPDATE!!!!!!!!!!! NOW EAT THIS UP WHILE I GET MORE BADGES AND DOCUMENTS SO I CAN FURTHER ADD MORE UNNECCESSARY DETAILS TO MY DEFINITIONS!!!!!
creator: CloseToMe
